$comment: SINGLE SOURCE for the Vacation Care — Office handoff. Edit this only; scripts/build-handoff.mjs generates HANDOFF.md, handoff.html, handover/*.json. Bump version + add a changelog row on every change.
title: Vacation Care — Office
summary: Desktop Office flow for centre staff to plan and run a Vacation Care holiday program: browse the month Calendar, manage Programs, build a program in Program Setup (days → activities → attached forms), and track per-child form completion in the Forms table. 'Done' = staff can set up a program with activity forms and see which children are missing a required form, end to end. The PES parent-facing mobile flow is a separate, later handoff.
outOfScope: Bulk CSV import wizard (stubbed in the prototype)
PES parent-facing mobile flow (separate handoff, next)
Publish / booking-open back-end behaviour (see open questions)
Real file storage + parent notification delivery

components.name: ds-btn
components.notes: primary actions, Add, Save, Notify, Remove form (minimal+error)

components.name: ds-pill
components.notes: status (Published/Draft/Completed/Starts in N), form indicator, Received/Missing

components.name: ds-selection-pill
components.notes: filters + day toggles. VC overrides: selected = solid --sd-colour-action-primary + white text (not the default mint); day toggles are 44x44 square at --sd-radius-m. Worth a DS variant decision.

components.name: ds-toggle
components.notes: Mandatory-form switch in the Form dialog

components.name: ds-input
components.notes: outside label above the box (ds-input style). Adds a select variant (chevron) and a search field with a trailing circular teal button — reconcile with the shipped ds-input.

components.name: vc-seg-switch
components.notes: net-new segmented track switch (Calendar/List view), phone/tablet-switch style — grey track, selected segment raised white + teal border

components.name: vc-form-dialog
components.notes: centred modal (not the mobile bottom-sheet); needs focus management — see a11y

motion.notes: No splash. Toasts auto-dismiss ~2.6s. prefers-reduced-motion removes button transitions.

screens.name: Vacation Care Calendar
screens.purpose: Day / Week / Month views of scheduled activities; jump into a day's forms.
screens.exit: → S2 via the List View switch; → S4 by clicking an activity chip; → S3 via Add Activity
layout: Page head: title + Calendar/List segmented switch (right)
Card header: ‹ period › nav + title + Day/Week/Month segmented switch + Today
Modelled on the product's vue-cal calendar. Month = 7-col Mon-start grid; Week = 7 day columns; Day = single column

Day cell: date number (today in a teal circle), activity chips (name, booked/capacity, optional 'N forms missing' in error red), and a '+ Add Activity' that appears on hover only; program week is tinted

redlines.spec: 26px teal filled circle on the date number

behaviour: Three views via a Day/Week/Month segmented switch (modelled on the product's vue-cal calendar).
‹ / › page by month/week/day per the active view; bounded to Jan 2025 – Dec 2027 (chevrons disable at the bounds).
Month grid is Monday-start; leading blanks computed from the 1st weekday. Week = Mon-start 7 columns; Day = single column.
Today returns to month view at the demo data date (13 Mar 2026); today's date shows in a teal circle. Activities render only in the data month in the prototype.
Clicking an activity chip opens that activity's Forms table (S4).
'+ Add Activity' appears on hover (or keyboard focus-within) of a day cell only — never persistently stamped on every day; it opens Program Setup (S3).
a11y: Period-nav, view switch, and Today are buttons with accessible names.
Activity chips + Add Activity are buttons; Add Activity is revealed on :hover and :focus-within so it's keyboard-reachable.
Activity chips need a visible focus ring (gap A5); 'forms missing' must not rely on colour alone — keep the text.

acceptance.assert: prev disabled at 2025-01; next disabled at 2027-12

acceptance.text: Activities only show in the data month.
Clicking an activity opens its Forms table.
acceptance.assert: click(activityChip) -> route == S4 with activity in context

acceptance.text: Day/Week/Month switch changes the view; nav pages by that unit.
acceptance.assert: view=week -> 7 day columns; view=day -> 1 column; ‹/› step by week/day respectively

acceptance.text: Add Activity is hidden until the day cell is hovered/focused.
acceptance.assert: .vc-add opacity==0 by default AND ==1 on day-cell :hover/:focus-within

screens.name: Vacation Care Programs
screens.purpose: List, filter and manage holiday programs.
screens.entry: Vacation Care → Program list, or the List View switch
screens.exit: → S3 via Edit / View / + Add; delete via confirm dialog
layout: Page head: title + Calendar/List segmented switch
Row: full-width Search (trailing teal circle) + status filters (All/Published/Draft/Completed)
Program card: name, dates · duration, status pills, row actions (View if published · Edit · Duplicate · Delete)
behaviour: Filters narrow the list by status; counts reflect the data set.
Edit / + Add open Program Setup (S3); View opens S3 read-only for published programs.
Duplicate clones the program as a draft copy (toast).
Delete opens a confirm dialog warning if the program is published / may have live bookings.
a11y: Row-action icon buttons have aria-labels (View/Edit/Duplicate/Delete program).
Filters are buttons; selected conveyed by more than colour (text + count remain).
Confirm dialog needs focus management (gap A3).

acceptance.text: Status filters narrow the list and show counts.
acceptance.assert: click(filter=draft) -> rows all status==draft AND filter label count matches

acceptance.text: Delete always routes through a confirm dialog.
acceptance.assert: click(delete) -> alertdialog visible; confirm removes the program

acceptance.text: View action appears only for published programs.

screens.name: Program Setup + Form dialog
screens.purpose: Build a program: details → per-day activities → attached forms.
screens.exit: Save → back to S2; Form dialog overlays this screen
layout: Program Details card: Program Name, Number of weeks, Holiday start date, Parent booking opens
Week card: day toggles (M T W T F S S, square) + Clear days; per active day a title row (day name + form indicator pill(s)) then activity rows
Activity row: Name / Fee / Room / ⋯ (48px outlined)
Form dialog (centred modal): Form name, Form upload (drag/drop document or Browse), Mandatory toggle + helper, footer Remove form (edit) · Cancel · Save

copy.text: Edit form · Remove form · Duplicate · Delete
Parents must complete this form before their booking for the activity is confirmed.
Drag and drop a document here · Accepted: PDF, DOC, DOCX · max 10 MB

behaviour: Day toggles add/remove that day's activity block.
Activity ⋯ menu is contextual: no form → Add form; has form → Edit form + Remove form.
Add/Edit form opens the dialog; Edit pre-fills name, file and mandatory state.
Remove form (menu or dialog) detaches the form (toast).
The form indicator pill ('Form' / 'Form · required') sits beside the day title.
Save returns to S2 (prototype shows a toast; real publish behaviour TBD).
a11y: Form dialog must move focus in on open, trap focus, close on Esc, and restore focus on close (gap A3).
Back link and + Add activity must be real buttons/links, keyboard-operable (gap A2).
Mandatory toggle is role=switch with an accessible name.

acceptance.text: Row menu is contextual to whether a form is attached.
acceptance.assert: menu(activity without form) == [Add form,Duplicate,Delete]; menu(activity with form) == [Edit form,Remove form,Duplicate,Delete]

acceptance.text: Edit form opens the dialog pre-filled.
acceptance.assert: Edit form -> dialog[name,file,mandatory] populated from the activity

acceptance.text: Remove form detaches the form from the activity.
acceptance.assert: Remove form -> activity.form == null AND indicator pill gone

acceptance.text: Save is disabled until the form has a name.

screens.name: Forms tracking table
screens.purpose: Track per-child form completion for an activity and chase missing forms.
layout: Back link + activity title + date + Notify missing forms (n)
Table: select · Actions (view, send reminder) · Child's first/last name · Primary carer · Form name · Attached by · Status · Upload date

copy.text: Child’s first name · Child’s last name · Primary carer · Form name · Attached by · Status · Upload date

behaviour: Status filter narrows rows to All / Received / Missing.
Missing rows show '—' for Attached by and Upload date (nothing attached).
Notify sends a reminder; toast confirms the count.
Per-row send-reminder is available; bulk-select ↔ Notify scope is an open question.
a11y: Row checkboxes + header select-all have accessible names.
Action icon buttons (View form / Send reminder) have aria-labels.
Status is text, not colour alone.

acceptance.text: Missing rows never show an 'Attached by' name.
Notify count equals the number of missing rows.

stateMatrix.copy: <Program> will be permanently deleted. (published → may have live bookings.) This can’t be undone.
Add form / Edit form — name, upload, mandatory

platformDeltas.web: Desktop Office portal (1280+), left nav + top bar
platformDeltas.ios: n/a — PES is a separate mobile handoff
platformDeltas.android: n/a — PES is a separate mobile handoff

openQuestions.q: Program Setup has no Publish action — what flips Draft→Published and opens parent bookings? (audit U1)
'Number of weeks' doesn't yet render Week 2…N — confirm multi-week behaviour. (audit U2)
Forms table: does Notify act on selected rows or all-missing? Need a bulk-action bar. (audit U3)
Keyboard a11y: nav items + links must be focusable, dialog needs focus trap/Esc. (audit A1–A3)
ds-selection-pill: ship a solid-green selected variant + a square day-toggle variant, or keep as prototype overrides?

decisions.decision: Manage Form resolved as a contextual ⋯ menu: Add form when none, Edit form + Remove form when attached; Edit opens the same full dialog pre-filled.
decisions.rationale: Removes the 'just view vs rename/detach?' ambiguity raised in review — it's a full edit panel, not a viewer.

decisions.decision: Selected filters/day-toggles use solid action-primary; Calendar/List uses a segmented track switch.
decisions.rationale: Matches the Figma; the segmented switch reads as a true toggle, not two buttons.

decisions.decision: Missing form rows show '—' for Attached by.
decisions.rationale: Fixes the wireframe contradiction of a name against a Missing status.

changelog.change: Initial Office handoff (Calendar, Programs, Setup + Form dialog, Forms table).
Inputs/selects use the outside label (above the box), matching ds-input; was a notched label.
Calendar rebuilt on the product's vue-cal model: Day/Week/Month views, today in a teal circle, and '+ Add Activity' on hover only.
